title: Permission Denied when connecting Monday on Make.com
excerpt: Im trying to access new values in a column through make.com. Im getting a permission denied even though my connection is good. Any suggestions?

posts.author: kshawjr (Kevin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Im trying to access new values in a column through make.com. Im getting a permission denied even though my connection is good. Any suggestions?

Screenshot 2-2-2024 at 01.13 PM2866×1242 239 KB

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @kshawjr,

I am not an expert in this platform, but could it be that the issue lies with Make.com and not with monday.com’s end?

I recommend checking this with Make’s support so see what is failing here.

Cheers,
Matias
